task_objective: Implement Backup Browser with point-in-time restore
design_decisions: Used TDD to implement new adapter/lifecycle features before touching UI.
list_backups endpoint extracts the 'backups' list and computes size/file_count with `_backup_disk_stats`.
BackupBrowserModal fetches data on mount, lists snapshots by date descending, and offers a Restore button.
Integrated restore action into the QAM global operation state to show busy status and toasts.
Updated README to announce new feature.
results: All tests and quality gates passing. Feature ready for review.
